task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS system
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to https://localhost:7001 or the Nx Witness client application is open.

task_completion.description: Authenticate using the provided admin credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The login screen with 'admin' entered, or the main dashboard of Nx Witness showing the user is logged in as admin.

task_completion.description: Locate and view the active cameras in the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or grid of camera feeds (e.g., Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, Lobby Camera, Loading Dock Camera) is visible in the VMS interface.

task_completion.description: Take snapshots of the camera feeds
task_completion.visual_evidence: Context menus (e.g., right-click -> 'Save snapshot' or similar), download indicators, or save dialogs appearing over the camera feeds.

task_completion.description: Save the snapshots to the specified ReferenceImages directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or GUI save dialog showing the current path as /home/ga/Documents/ReferenceImages.

task_completion.description: Name the files correctly with underscores and .jpg extension
task_completion.visual_evidence: Saved files visible in the directory with names like 'Parking_Lot_Camera.jpg', 'Entrance_Camera.jpg', etc., where spaces are replaced by underscores and the extension is .jpg.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the VMS via GUI rather than terminal API calls
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Nx Witness web interface or desktop client, rather than using terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget' to fetch images.

integrity.description: Agent saved actual image files rather than creating fake text files
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager shows image thumbnails for the saved .jpg files, or an image viewer is opened showing actual camera snapshots, rather than a text editor or terminal 'touch' command being used to create empty files.

integrity.description: Agent used GUI to name files or standard file operations, not a pre-written script to bypass manual work
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of a terminal window running a bash script or python script specifically written to automatically rename and move files to bypass the manual saving process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/ReferenceImages'. The files must be saved with a '.jpg' extension. There are 5 active virtual test cameras in the system: 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', 'Server Room Camera', 'Lobby Camera', and 'Loading Dock Camera'. The expected filenames are 'Parking_Lot_Camera.jpg', 'Entrance_Camera.jpg', 'Server_Room_Camera.jpg', 'Lobby_Camera.jpg', and 'Loading_Dock_Camera.jpg'.
